facts.statement: The Great Wall of China is only 5,000 km long
The Great Wall of China averages over 20 meters in height
The Great Wall of China was first built 500 years ago
facts.actual: Construction began in the 7th century BC, about 2,700 years ago

facts.statement: The top of the Great Wall is over 10 meters wide
facts.actual: Approximately 5 meters wide at the top

facts.statement: Over 100,000 workers were simultaneously building the Great Wall at its peak
facts.actual: Around 62,000 workers built one major section simultaneously
